title: Java Gen AI  Engineer
company_focus: Digital solutions company accelerating AI adoption
description:
Role: Java AI Engineer Overview We are seeking a Senior Java
Engineer with hands-on GenAI engineering experience to
design and implement AI-driven solutions, Agentic workflows,
and performance engineering frameworks. This role requires a
strong blend of technical depth, practical AI engineering
experience, and a genuine passion for the evolving AI
landscape. This is a flexible engagement, with openness to
global talent. The right candidate will play a critical role
in accelerating AI adoption and scaling internal
capabilities. Key Responsibilities Design and implement AI-
driven solutions aligned with business and executive
priorities as well as ability make these solutions
interoperable with current applications Translate AI
concepts into practical, production-ready implementations
Collaborate with internal stakeholders and existing offshore
teams Help bridge gaps in AI expertise and scale knowledge
across the organization Contribute to UI/web-based AI
implementations where applicable (Open WebUI or similar
tools) Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and
AI service integration Exposure to enterprise-scale AI
projects and data pipelines Understanding of security best
practices in AI applications Required Qualifications 1+ year
of hands-on AI engineering experience (LLMs, AI tools,
applied AI systems) Proven ability to “walk the talk” —
strong hands-on builder, not just theoretical Experience
designing and deploying real-world AI solutions Strong
understanding of modern AI trends, tools, and frameworks
Preferred Qualifications Experience with AI-enabled web
interfaces / UI frameworks (e.g., Open WebUI or similar)
Background working with distributed or offshore teams
Ability to operate effectively with limited overlap across
time zones Profile & Mindset Deep passion for technology and
AI — sees it as more than just a job Self-driven, proactive,
and able to operate with high visibility and urgency
Comfortable working in fast-moving, evolving environments
Strong communicator wi
responsibilities: Design and implement AI-driven solutions aligned with business and executive priorities, ensuring interoperability with current applications
Translate AI concepts into practical, production-ready implementations
Collaborate with internal stakeholders and existing offshore teams to deliver AI solutions
Bridge gaps in AI expertise and scale AI knowledge across the organization
Contribute to UI/web-based AI implementations using tools like Open WebUI or similar
Integrate AI solutions with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and AI services
Work with enterprise-scale AI projects and data pipelines
Apply security best practices in AI applications
use_cases: AI-driven business solutions aligned with executive priorities
AI-enabled web interfaces for internal or customer use
Enterprise-scale AI project deployment and integration
Knowledge scaling and AI adoption acceleration across the organization
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly designing and implementing AI-
driven solutions, Agentic workflows, and working with LLMs
and AI tools in a hands-on capacity. The engineer is
expected to build, deploy, and integrate AI systems into
production, making this clearly an ai-first role.
